src: An Act of 1849 repealed the Navigation Laws , enabling foreign ships to import into British possessions in Asia , Africa and America and to carry the goods of any nation into Britain itself , though the masters and three - quarters of the crew of British vessels were to remain British and the coasting trade was to remain in British hands , at least for the time being .
mt: "Ein Akt von 1849 hob die Navigationsgesetze auf, wodurch ausländische Schiffe in britischen Besitzungen in Asien, Afrika und Amerika Waren importieren und in Großbritannien selbst Güter aus jeder Nation einführen durften. Die Besatzung und drei Viertel der Besatzung der britischen Schiffe sollten jedoch britisch bleiben und die Küstenschifffahrt sollte zumindest für den Moment in britischen Händen bleiben."

src: And Senator Eagleton , who had successfully brought in a reclassification amendment so that amphetamine would be more tightly controlled , stated , when he saw the amendment subsequently overturned : ‘ when the chips are down , the power of the drug companies was simply more compelling than any appeal to the public welfare’(p . 53 ) .

src: To loose them off together , scatter - gun fashion : Stavrogin says ‘ I am making this statement , incidentally , to prove I am in full possession of my mental faculties and understand my position’ ; ‘ I want to forgive myself , this is my chief aim , my whole aim’ ; ‘ I want everyone to look at me’ ; ‘ I fall back on this as my last resource’ ; ‘ The thing about me then was I felt bored with life , sick and tired of it’ ; ‘ I am seeking boundless suffering’ ; ‘ I took it into my head to mutilate my life somehow’(not necessarily the same thing as seeking suffering , any more than seeking suffering need entail accepting it ) .

src: Bugey is one of those lost corners of France , a hilly region to the north - east of Lyon , around the town of Bellay , whose only claim to fame is that it is the birthplace of the French gastronome , Brillat - Savarin .

src: Geographical distance is a barrier to face to face meetings which is maybe why a network such as this is particularly attractive to teachers working away from centres of population .

src: The meeting was held as advertised and Kinloch addressed it in a wordy speech in which , after pleading with his audience to keep the peace , he criticized the government for excessive taxation , and declaimed : ‘ In short , the whole of our misfortune as a nation , the whole of our misery , the whole of our distress , can be clearly traced to the circumstances of the people being deprived of their share of the British Constitution by not having a voice in the election of persons to represent them in the House of Commons.’
mt: "Die Versammlung wurde wie angekündigt abgehalten und Kinloch behandelte sie in einer wortreichen Rede, in der er, nachdem er seine Zuhörer aufgefordert hatte, die Ruhe zu bewahren, die Regierung für übermäßige Besteuerung kritisierte und verkündete: 'Kurz gesagt kann die ganze Not unseres Landes, unsere ganze Not, unsere ganze Notlage eindeutig auf die Umstände zurückgeführt werden, dass die Menschen nicht an der Wahl der Personen beteiligt waren, die sie im Unterhaus vertreten.'"

src: Perhaps the reason that I am the invisible man ( in Gadfly terms ) is because I do n't frequent the same watering holes as your journalists .

src: the number of shares issued under any employee share scheme not involving the grant of options , when aggregated with the number of shares made issuable pursuant to options granted ( excluding lapsed options ) under the Executive Scheme and any other employee share option scheme shall not in any ten year period exceed 10 % of the Company 's issued ordinary share capital for the time being ;

src: One result of this moral panic was that , even as the anxiety mentioned by Furlong ( ibid . ) forced us to react to these public demands with some arrests , we insiders with ‘ special knowledge’ , who were working face to face with the counter - culture , knew there was a different social reality abroad which we could never adequately explain to the entrepreneur or encapsulate for the media headline .
mt: "Eine Folge dieses moralischen Panik war, dass, auch als die von Furlong (ibd.) erwähnte Angst uns zwang, auf diese öffentlichen Forderungen mit einigen Festnahmen zu reagieren, wir Insider mit 'spezialem Wissen' waren, die direkt mit der Gegenkultur zusammenarbeiteten, wussten, dass es eine andere soziale Realität jenseits unserer Reichweite gab, die wir dem Unternehmer oder für den Medieneintrag nicht angemessen erklären konnten."

src: Goals from Jimmy Quinn and Philip Gray — his first for the international team — were enough to see of the Baltic challenge although Denmark 's victory over Albania earlier in the day put paid to our last fading hopes of qualifying for the World Cup finals in America .

src: As we have seen , however , trade - unionism failed to take root less because of intelligentsia influence than because of the constraints placed upon it by the tsarist State .

src: The wide range of source material presents participants with the challenge of working in English in order to get to grips with a variety of business problems .

src: Madam Deputy Speaker there is course another matter of er of er broader significance and that is that er whilst these orders er er er cover erm certain financial institutions , they do n't erm they do n't cover others , they do n't cover Lloyds of London in so far as I could see , erm I 'd half expected to see the honourable member for Gloucester West er in his place to pursue his campaign that apparently he er he he is not able to be here and indeed er others who sit on the benches opposite who lost a large sum of money in Lloyds , er but they might have had something to say about it as it does seem odd that Lloyds has not been covered , no doubt the minister would tell us that needs primary legislation and I I 'm quite sure this government would move heaven and earth not to introduce another Lloyds bill er because of er the problems that that would no doubt attract .
mt: "Sehr geehrte Vizepräsidentin, es gibt ein weiteres Thema von größerer Bedeutung, nämlich dass, obwohl diese Anordnungen bestimmte Finanzinstitute abdecken, sie andere nicht abdecken, wie zum Beispiel Lloyds of London, soweit ich sehen konnte. Ich hätte erwartet, den ehrenwerten Abgeordneten für Gloucester West in seiner Position zu sehen, seine Kampagne zu verfolgen, die er offenbar nicht durchführen kann, und auch andere, die auf der gegenüberliegenden Bank sitzen und in Lloyds einen großen Geldverlust erlitten haben. Es ist jedoch merkwürdig, dass Lloyds nicht abgedeckt ist. Der Minister wird uns wahrscheinlich sagen, dass dies eine primäre Gesetzgebung erfordert, und ich bin mir sicher, dass diese Regierung nicht ein weiteres Lloyds-Gesetz einführen würde, aufgrund der Probleme, die es sicherlich anziehen würde."

src: There is no need to go back to square one ; just a few steps backward is all that is needed .

src: And when these did n't meet with immediate success , yet more surveys were done and more programmes developed — until , ultimately , it was decided that , if parents could not be trusted to do the right thing , the decision had to be taken out of their hands .

src: Thus , to give one case example in ten thousand that spring to mind , no psychiatrist in his right mind would pay credence or even attention to the findings , as uncovered by Hans Eysenck some years ago , that patients undergoing psychoanalysis have an improvement rate of 44 per cent , those subject to the effects of other psychotherapy recover at the rate of 64 per cent , and those to whom nothing whatever is done , who receive no treatment at all , are cured at a rate of 72 per cent .
mt: Daher, als Beispiel in tausend, das mir einfällt, würde kein Psychiater in seinem rechten Verstand die Erkenntnisse, die Hans Eysenck vor einigen Jahren entdeckt hat, ernst nehmen oder sogar beachten: dass Patienten, die an Psychoanalyse teilnehmen, eine Verbesserungshäufigkeit von 44 % haben, diejenigen, die den Wirkungen anderer Psychotherapien ausgesetzt sind, sich mit einer Rate von 64 % erholen, und diejenigen, denen nichts Geringeres getan wird, die keine Behandlung erhalten, werden mit einer Rate von 72 % geheilt.

mt: "In Appalachia, wie in anderen Teilen der Welt, die wir immer mehr erkennen, gibt es eine zunehmende Dringlichkeit, dass kleine Hügelbauern ihre Einkommensquellen diversifizieren, indem sie neben der Landwirtschaft andere Arbeiten aufnehmen, oder andernfalls verkaufen und umziehen müssen, aufgrund des steigenden finanziellen Drucks, um ihren Lebensunterhalt zu verdienen."

src: But should go to another factory and er hold your own in the factory you could expect to get the full money , which I did at twenty one .
mt: Aber sollte man in eine andere Fabrik gehen und dort seine eigene Stelle einnehmen, könnte man erwarten, die volle Bezahlung zu erhalten, wie ich es mit 21 Jahren getan habe."

src: So I put two and two together and told the state police.’
mt: "Also habe ich zwei und zwei zusammengefügt und habe der Staatsanwaltschaft gesagt."

src: This was disconcerting , to say the least .
mt: "Das war ziemlich beunruhigend, um es zu sagen."

src: The following are the principal cases where that leave would be forthcoming:(1 ) relief is sought against any person domiciled in England or Wales;(2 ) an injunction is sought ordering the defendant to do an act or refrain from doing anything ( whether or not damages are also claimed in respect of a failure to do something or for the doing of that thing);(3 ) the claim is brought against any person duly served within or out of England and Wales and a person out of England and Wales is a necessary or proper party thereto;(4 ) the claim is founded on any breach or alleged breach of any contract wherever made , which:(a ) according to its terms ought to be performed in England and Wales , or ( b ) is by its terms , or by implication , governed by English law , or ( c ) contains a term to the effect that a court in England or Wales shall have jurisdiction to hear and determine any action in respect of the contract;(5 ) the claim is founded on a tort and the damage was sustained or resulted from an act committed , within England and Wales;(6 ) the whole subject - matter of the proceedings is land ( with or without rent or profits ) or the perpetuation of testimony relating to land;(7 ) the claim is brought to construe , rectify , set aside or enforce an act , deed , will , contract , obligation or liability affecting land;(8 ) the claim is made for a debt secured on immovable property or is made to assert , declare or determine proprietary or possessory rights , or rights of security , in or over movable property , or to obtain authority to dispose of movable property;(9 ) the claim is brought to execute the trusts of a written instrument , being trusts that ought to be executed according to English law and of which the person to be served with the originating process is a trustee , or for any relief or remedy which might be obtained when such a claim is brought;(10 ) the claim is made for the administration of the estate of a person who died domiciled in England or Wales or for any relief or remedy which might be obtained when such a claim is made;(11 ) the claim is brought in a probate action within the meaning of Ord 41;(12 ) the claim is brought to enforce any judgment or arbitral award;(13 ) the claim is brought against a defendant not domiciled in Scotland or Northern Ireland in respect of a claim by the Commissioners of Inland Revenue for or in relation to any of the duties of taxes which have been , or are for the time being , placed under their care and management;(14 ) the claim is brought in respect of contributions under the Social Security Act 1975;(15 ) the claim is made for a sum to which the Directive of the Council of the European Communities dated 15 March 1976 No 76/308/EEC applies , and service is to be effected in a country which is a member of the European Economic Community .
mt: Die folgenden sind die Hauptfälle, in denen ein Abzug zu erwarten ist:(1) Erleichterung wird gegen eine Person gesucht, die in England oder Wales ansässig ist;(2) eine einstweilige Verfügung wird beantragt, um den Beklagten zu einer Handlung zu zwingen oder zu verhindern, unabhängig davon, ob Schadensersatzansprüche in Bezug auf eine Nichterfüllung oder die Ausübung dieser Handlung geltend gemacht werden; (3) die Klage wird gegen eine Person erhoben, die innerhalb oder außerhalb von England und Wales ordnungsgemäß benachrichtigt wurde, und eine Person außerhalb von England und Wales ist ein notwendiger oder angemessener Beklagter; (4) die Klage basiert auf einem Verstoß oder einer mutmaßlichen Verletzung eines Vertrags, der:(a) nach seinen Bedingungen in England und Wales ausgeführt werden sollte, oder (b) nach seinen Bedingungen oder durch Implikation nach englischem Recht geregelt ist

src: He is keen to exchange the first gifts , but the laibon 's family first want to see if he can cut the mustard .
mt: "Er ist bereit, die ersten Geschenke auszutauschen, aber die Familie des Laibons möchte zuerst sehen, ob er das kann."

src: In 1961 Lionel McColvin wrote that ‘ the successful children 's librarian’ must have ‘ common sense , which means that she must be able to take things as they are , to do simply what the situation requires , without fuss , to give and take , to be tolerant , to be practical .
mt: Im Jahr 1961 schrieb Lionel McColvin, dass 'die erfolgreiche Kinderbibliothekarin' 'gemeinsinnige' haben muss, was bedeutet, dass sie in der Lage sein muss, Dinge so zu nehmen, wie sie sind, einfach das zu tun, was die Situation erfordert, ohne Aufhebens zu machen, zu geben und zu nehmen, tolerant zu sein und praktisch zu sein.

src: If you want me to trust in you , you 'll have to do more than protest your innocence , or you go it alone.’
mt: "Wenn du mich in dich vertrauen willst, musst du mehr tun als nur deine Unschuld zu protestieren, oder du gehst es alleine."

src: The refugees in that camp have been living from hand to mouth for a month .
mt: "Die Flüchtlinge in diesem Lager haben in einem Monat von Hand zu Mund gelebt."

src: Did n't the Anglicans try and have it both ways ?

src: When asked if she thought Outdoor Action readers were being petty in writing to complain about blocked paths , her reply was forceful to say the least .
mt: "Wenn gefragt, ob sie glaubte, dass Outdoor Action-Leser in der Beschwerde über blockierte Wege pünktlich waren, war ihre Antwort kraftvoll, um es zu sagen."

src: Make hay while the sun shines , you know .

mt: Über die nächsten vier Jahre grub sie auch einen breiten krautigen Rand entlang einer Seite für traditionelle Pflanzen wie Knabenkraut, Herzblut und Papaver Orientale.

src: He finds that the feast of the Ascension is about to be celebrated , and he hears Professors Hanky and Panky say to each ~ other that they never set eyes on the man Higgs , and they hope they never will ; but they are the High Priests of the religion of the Sun ~ Child .
mt: "Er findet heraus, dass die Festmahlzeit der Himmelfahrt bevorsteht, und er hört die Professoren Hanky und Panky zu sich sagen, dass sie den Mann Higgs nie gesehen haben und hoffen, ihn auch nie zu sehen; aber sie sind die Hohepriester der Religion des Sonnenkindes."

src: The women are also warned by the men that if they , the women , should set eyes on the masks of the ceremony , the men would manhandle , rape , and disfigure them .
mt: "Die Frauen werden auch von den Männern gewarnt, dass, wenn sie, die Frauen, die Masken des Zeremoniells anstarren, die Männer sie manhandeln, vergewaltigen und entstellen würden."

src: They are , furthermore , dead and buried and have no recourse to the revenge squads despatched from the Middle East to the four corners of the world .

mt: Pamperte kleine Kuh, mit ihrer öffentlichen blutenden Herzens.

src: ‘ It means that , since the de Sciorto title dates from the mid - sixteenth century , I come somewhere in the middle of the pecking order,’ he grinned , his eyes lidded as he moved his gaze down over her defensively folded arms , lingering on the golden swell of her breasts at the button fastening on her T - shirt .
mt: "Das bedeutet, dass, da der Titel de' Sciorto aus der Mitte des 16. Jahrhunderts stammt, ich irgendwo dazwischen stehe, grinned er, seine Augenlider leicht zusammengezogen, als er seinen Blick über ihre defensiv zusammengeknöpften Arme senkte und sich auf den goldenen Knopf am Revers ihres T - Shirts konzentrierte, der ihre Brüste betonte."

src: The Group 's entitlement to turnover proceeds from Indonesian LNG sales is included in turnover after adjustment to add back the Group 's share of transportation and liquefaction costs and debt service which is deducted on an incurred basis on loans raised by the owner to finance the construction and expansion costs of the Bontang LNG plant which is operated on a break even basis .
mt: "Die Gruppe 's Ansprüche auf Umsatzanteile aus den indonesischen LNG-Verkäufen sind nach der Anpassung enthalten, die die Gruppe 's Anteil an den Transport- und Verdampfungskosten sowie den Darlehensservice hinzufügt, der auf Basis des Erstattungsprinzips von Darlehen, die der Eigentümer zur Finanzierung der Bau- und Erweiterungskosten des Bontang-LNG-Staudamms aufgenommen hat, der auf einem Break-Even-Betrieb basiert, in den Umsatz einbezogen werden."

src: Garvey needed to beat Bann and then hope Mark Sinnamon 's men would turn the tables on Holywood , so that they could force a play - off , but that scenario never looked likely .
mt: "Garvey brauchte, um Bann zu schlagen und dann zu hoffen, dass Marks Sinnamon 's Männer die Wende in Holywood machen würden, damit sie einen Spielausgleich erzwingen könnten, aber diese Situation schien nie wahrscheinlich."

src: It is a fact of human personality that the argument which is supported by the greater weight of evidence does not always win the day ; people do not like to be proved wrong .

src: Mr Murdoch 's empire recently admitted that mounting debts were taking a toll of its finances — an admission which analysts interpreted as a sign that the group , which owns five British national newspapers , would not be making any purchases for the time being .

src: Not wildly entertaining , but with unintentionally wildly funny moments , this recollection of the first crossing of the Atlantic by Christopher Columbus 500 years ago , is more round the bend than round the world .
mt: "Nicht sonderlich unterhaltsam, aber mit unabsichtlich wild lustigen Momenten, ist diese Erinnerung an die erste Überquerung des Atlantiks durch Christoph Kolumbus 500 Jahre her eher um den kleinen Kreis als um den großen Kreis."

src: So , early this century , the regulatory position might be briefly summarised as protecting the minority of people driven into debt to make ends meet ; on the assumption that they faced not only hardship in itself but also particular risk of exploitation by unscrupulous lenders .
mt: "So, in diesem Jahrhundert, könnte die regulatorische Position kurz zusammengefasst werden, um die Minderheit von Menschen zu schützen, die in Schulden geraten sind, um ihren Lebensunterhalt zu verdienen; unter der Annahme, dass sie nicht nur mit der Härte selbst zu kämpfen hatten, sondern auch einem besonderen Risiko der Ausbeutung durch unlautere Gläubiger ausgesetzt waren."

src: It is never easy to come to terms with death — it brings with it a surfeit of emotions ; disbelief , anger , guilt , resentment and remorse .

src: Finding accommodation and getting to it proved as easy as falling off a log ; there were free - phone backpacker ads in the airport , we rang one of them and they had a ( free ) minibus waiting right there , which took all of us including bike .

src: Being used — as Luke had used her last night — was humiliating , and even though she had been able to turn the tables it had left a bitter after - taste .

src: Above all , phenomenology makes clear that , because of its naturalism , psychology simply could not come to terms with the activity and the properly radical problem of spirit 's life .

src: But the general proposition that human affairs must be understood from within does not require the assumption that individuals make history , except perhaps as a convenient device for identifying what calls for deeper understanding .
mt: Aber die allgemeine Annahme, dass menschliche Angelegenheiten aus innen heraus verstanden werden müssen, erfordert nicht die Annahme, dass Individuen Geschichte machen, es sei denn, als ein bequemes Mittel zur Identifizierung dessen, was eine tiefere Verständnis erfordert.

src: Ginger 's greatest single claim to fame is that he set up a record for an inside - forward that has never been beaten at our club , when he scored five goals in the game against Southend at The Palace on 25 September 1909 .

src: In fact the chances for viewing exciting wildlife are getting rarer every day , as hundreds more people take to the hills , bringing dogs and children and wearing colours that can be seen as far away as Belgium .
